_comment: Knockout bracket results. 'winners' = advanced past this round. 'losers' = eliminated at this round.

_rounds.r32: First knockout round (32→16). Winners reach שמינית גמר. These score 'round_of_16' picks.
_rounds.r16: Round of 16 / שמינית גמר (16→8). Winners reach רבע גמר. These score 'quarter_final' picks.
_rounds.qf: Quarter-finals / רבע גמר (8→4). Winners reach חצי גמר. These score 'semi_final' picks.
_rounds.sf: Semi-finals / חצי גמר (4→2). Winners reach גמר. These score 'final' picks.
